scripts.android:init: cd apps/android && npm install --no-bin-links && node node_modules/@capacitor/cli/bin/capacitor add android
scripts.android:open: cd apps/android && node node_modules/@capacitor/cli/bin/capacitor open android
scripts.android:sync: cd apps/android && node node_modules/@capacitor/cli/bin/capacitor sync android
scripts.desktop:dev: cd apps/desktop-electron && npm install --no-bin-links && npm run dev
